name: @ziri
description: ZIRI - Proxy server with management UI and CLI

scripts.dev: concurrently -n proxy,ui -c blue,green "npm run dev:proxy" "npm run dev:ui"
scripts.build: npm run build:ui && npm run build:proxy
scripts.cypress:run:tls: cross-env NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 CYPRESS_BASE_URL=https://localhost:3000 CYPRESS_PROXY_URL=https://localhost:3100 cypress run
scripts.cypress:open:tls: cross-env NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 CYPRESS_BASE_URL=https://localhost:3000 CYPRESS_PROXY_URL=https://localhost:3100 cypress open
scripts.e2e:run: start-server-and-test "npm run dev" https-get://localhost:3000/login "npm run cypress:run:tls"
scripts.e2e:open: start-server-and-test "npm run dev" https-get://localhost:3000/login "npm run cypress:open:tls"
